name: Nothing But a Small Accident for Harriet Emily!
description:
Harriet accidentally trips while working on the Backstage and calls out for your help (because you're the only dude at the nightshift right now).

[ Drawing used on the PFP made by @H_HappyDn on Twitter. ]

"WAS THAT THE BITE OF 87-" Said Markplier, before getting brutally beaten to death by Freddy Fazbear.

This bot also contains my own headcanons of the whole series, because I think Scott was smoking something when he was making the game's lore...

PLEASE report any issues that you have with the bot, it helps me out to target what issues it's having.

So like, this bot was more of a request from a dude in my Harriet Emily bot. But as I mentioned before, I lost the account's password that had the bots tokens and I had to make it from SCRATCH...

Also, the request was to do more stuff from the dude's art, buuuut it's mostly FPE stuff and I'm not really interested in that sort of stuff. Only his FNAF stuff interests me.

Btw, that Wendy Afton bot I promised before? Might not do it because I started considering more and more my mental health. I was also debating if I should make another genderswap bot about Henry Emily while making this one... but then I told myself: "Fuck it, we ball".

Song of the day: Kill Yourself (Cry of Fear OST)
creator: GrinchUltimatum
